nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (Daily 8am)
nodes.notes: Runs automatically Monday–Friday at 8am. Disable this node if you only want manual runs.

nodes.name: 1. Job Search URLs
nodes.notes: Update these URLs to change what jobs are scraped. LinkedIn URL covers: Salesforce, Software Dev, Werkstudent, Junior, Backend roles in Germany. Add more OR terms to broaden further.

nodes.name: 2a. Scrape LinkedIn
nodes.notes: LinkedIn scraper — count increased to 50 for broader coverage.

nodes.name: 2b. Scrape Indeed
nodes.notes: Indeed scraper — broadened to cover Salesforce, Software Dev, Werkstudent, Junior, Backend roles.

nodes.name: 3. Wait for All Scrapers
nodes.notes: Waits for both Apify scrapers to finish before normalizing.

nodes.name: 4. Normalize & Merge Jobs
nodes.notes: Normalizes LinkedIn + Indeed output into a standard shape. Deduplicates by URL. Filters to DACH + Benelux countries.

nodes.name: 2f. Read Applied Jobs
nodes.notes: Runs in parallel with scrapers from node 1. Execute Once = single Sheets API call.

nodes.name: 2f.1. Ensure Not Empty
nodes.notes: Passes a placeholder when sheet is empty so the Sync Merge always fires on first run.

nodes.name: 5. Sync Jobs + Sheet
nodes.notes: Waits for node 3 (jobs) and 6a.1 (sheet) before running dedup. Prevents empty-sheet blocking.

nodes.name: 6. Filter Duplicates
nodes.notes: Removes jobs already in your Google Sheet. Prevents duplicate applications across runs.

nodes.name: 7. GET Resume Context
nodes.notes: Fetches base resume as clean text from your local server. Uses host.docker.internal to reach localhost:3000 from inside Docker.

nodes.name: 10a. Build Match Prompt
nodes.notes: Builds Groq API request body. Outputs _groqApiKey + _groqBody for HTTP Request node.

nodes.name: 13a. Build Tailor Prompt
nodes.notes: Builds OpenAI request body with throttle. Outputs _openAIApiKey + _openAIBody for HTTP Request node.

nodes.name: 13b. OpenAI API Call
nodes.notes: Calls OpenAI API. n8n native retry: 3x, 12s wait. No sandbox fetch issues.

nodes.name: 14. Parse AI Patch
nodes.notes: Reads combined patch+coverLetter from single node 10. Handles missing/failed AI responses gracefully.

nodes.name: 15a. POST Generate Resume PDF
nodes.notes: Sends JSON patch to local server. Server merges into base resume, opens FlowCV via Playwright, downloads PDF.

nodes.name: 17. Log to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: SETUP: Update your Sheet headers to: Date, Company, Role, Job Type, Location, Source, Job URL, Apply URL, Match Confidence, Match Reason, Resume File, Cover Letter, Status, Applied, Response, Interview, Notes

nodes.name: 2c. Scrape StepStone
nodes.notes: StepStone scraper — employment types + remote filter configured.

parameters.customBody:
={
  "country": "Germany",
  "datePosted": "3",
  "deepSearch": false,
  "includeNoSalaryJob": true,
  "keywords": [
    "Salesforce Developer, Software Engineer"
  ],
  "location": "Germany",
  "maxItems": {{ $json.jobCount }},
  "saveOnlyUniqueItems": false
}

nodes.name: 2d. Scrape Glassdoor
nodes.notes: Glassdoor scraper — keywords, country=Germany, datePosted=3 days.

nodes.name: 2e. Scrape Xing
nodes.notes: Xing scraper — results_wanted from jobCount, startUrl from XingUrl.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ role: $("11. Parse AI Patch").item.json.job.title, company: $("11. Parse AI Patch").item.json.job.company, companyAddress: $("11. Parse AI Patch").item.json.job.location, paragraph1: $("11. Parse AI Patch").item.json.paragraph1, paragraph2: $("11. Parse AI Patch").item.json.paragraph2, paragraph3: $("11. Parse AI Patch").item.json.paragraph3 }) }}

nodes.name: 15b. POST Generate Cover Letter PDF
nodes.notes: Sends cover letter paragraphs to local server. Renders HTML and exports PDF via Playwright.

nodes.name: 10c. Groq API Call
nodes.notes: Calls Groq API. n8n native retry: 3x, 10s wait. No sandbox fetch issues.
